task: Using only the embedded packet, evaluate proposed API rate limits and recommend a rate-limit policy that balances abuse vs false positives. Classify clients C1-C4, compute expected abuse and false-positive costs, validate and show intermediate calculations, include formulas or executable logic in the spreadsheet, provide row-level citations to the embedded packet, perform sensitivity checks around controlling thresholds, document uncertainty and validation checks, and produce a final decision table labeling each client/policy as pass/warn/fail/needs_review. Deliverables: api_rate_limit_tuning.xlsx and abuse_response_memo.md. Do not import external data or invent missing values; explicitly note unresolved assumptions.
